expectations.text: Sets acceptedDocuments to [IdCard(region: .us), DriverLicense(region: .us)] — does NOT put passports in acceptedDocuments
expectations.evidence: Lines 28-31: acceptedDocuments uses IdCard(region: .usUnspecified) and DriverLicense(region: .usUnspecified) instead of .us. No Passport in acceptedDocuments, but the region enum value is wrong.

expectations.text: Sets rejectedDocuments to contain Passport — does NOT use acceptedDocuments to exclude passports
expectations.evidence: Lines 34-36: rejectedDocuments = [Passport(region: .any)]. Passport is correctly placed in rejectedDocuments.

expectations.text: Does NOT confuse acceptedDocuments and rejectedDocuments — wanted documents go in acceptedDocuments, unwanted in rejectedDocuments
expectations.evidence: US IdCard and DriverLicense (wanted) are in acceptedDocuments; Passport (unwanted) is in rejectedDocuments. The arrays are not swapped or conflated.
